title: Chat
noProjectsDescription: You don't have access to any projects yet. Please create a project or contact your organization administrator for access.
errorDescription: The chat interface encountered an error. Your conversation data is safe. Please try refreshing or starting a new conversation.
searchAcrossProjects: Search across all projects and recordings
askAcrossOrg: Ask about anything across all your projects...
enterToSend: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line
orgEmptyDescription: Search through all projects, recordings, transcriptions, and tasks. Get cross-project insights and find information across your entire organization.
orgExample1: "What are the common issues across all projects?"
orgExample2: "Show me all high-priority tasks from the last month"
projectEmptyDescription: Search through recordings, transcriptions, and tasks in this project. Get insights and find information quickly.
projectExample1: "What were the main topics discussed in recent meetings?"
projectExample2: "Show me all tasks assigned to John"
projectExample3: "What decisions were made about the budget?"
switchContextDescription: Switching to {name} will start a new conversation. Your current conversation will be saved and you can return to it later.
deleteConversationDescription: This conversation will be moved to deleted items. You can restore it within 30 days. After 30 days, it will be permanently deleted.
restoreConversationDescription: This conversation will be restored to your active conversations.
deleteSoon: This conversation will be permanently deleted soon.
exportDescription: Choose a format to export this conversation.
